{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320173637E588365FBEE554AC5A75"}"},"total":1482},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7261796574694376203","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"怎么这么快就没了，这是我觉得最甜的无限流了，其他的都是打着万人迷的旗号结果主角被各种欺负，这本才叫真正的受宠爱啊，太甜啦，大大加油写哦，多多更新","text_exts":[{"e":32,"s":29,"text":"万人迷","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%B8%87%E4%BA%BA%E8%BF%B7&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177399939754AC5A75%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227261796574694376203%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227244184801844923429%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%B8%87%E4%BA%BA%E8%BF%B7%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1690768906,"group_id":"7244184801844923429","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"极度女主控极度受控，不是的不要来我这发癫找存在感，杠就是我对","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N62zZS1jJy6xfVQ1NJw8SZA=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/4e17541a51c54dfba443a03c314b5cf6~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776536159&x-signature=A0NgdnpxljbBLOZyggpl%2FW3SK0o%3D","user_id":"98362171920","user_name":"baconflow"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"98362171920","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7244184801844923429","book_info":{"abstract":"【双男主＋切片无限流＋万人迷＋娇娇笨蛋美人】
唐及雪莫名其妙来到一个被称作噩梦的游戏中，游戏要他通关才能实现他想要复活的愿望。
　　游戏开始，抽去身份卡。
　　【滴——您的永久npc身份卡收取中】
　　【请对副本boss表达真心】
　　唐及雪：？什么鬼？
　　说好的恐怖游戏的呢！怎么变成恋爱游戏了啊喂！
　　于是唐及雪放开了浪，对着副本boss不断表达自己那颗真挚的心。
啥都没有，最会画饼！
  浪着浪着好像不太对，大怪物你的手能松松吗？嘞着我了！！
  大boss：虎视眈眈ing，看看谁敢跟我抢人！


　　他是在游戏中的怪物，由于过于强大，令他所在副本无法通关，被迫抹掉记忆，撕裂成各个副本的boss。

　　他们无一不满心恶意，却只沉沦于那一人的脆弱美丽。

　　“我是，你的怪物。”
小雪是笨蛋，真的小笨蛋，不喜点叉，谢谢","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o08c105d2e3eff62535fd621dd6dabf04~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"青云扰雾","author_id":"","book_id":"7244184801844923429","book_name":"成为无限游戏里的笨蛋美人npc","book_short_name":"神明专属","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3635人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":757,"name":"现代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=757&name=现代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7244184826151240207","read_count":"3635","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"255601"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"136","tags":"双男主,现代,纯爱","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/c5ae0cd9731835cbf4003b5950369e9d~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779183397&x-signature=2AFryvbBygPtIgZtcCOOW5XzP%2Fo%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4161007871868318","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"5.091511e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320173637E588365FBEE554AC5A75"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":103,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":5091,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":24007},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7275399399047889720","common":{"comment_type":31,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"语重心长的书评来啦！来看书评的书友们看我，听我的，这本书甜的，从头甜到尾，切片攻存在任何一个地方，玩家，NPC，BOSS都有可能是攻的切片，但是他们都一样很爱受，不会仗着一个副本有好几个切片存在就欺负受强迫受做不喜欢的事情，基本上都很宠爱受，受一开始以为自己走的海王路线，后面发现都是他的老攻，就更加爱他了，他俩很爱彼此，看的我好几次都落泪，真的写的很好，是我觉得我能看我能不违背我自己内心打五星还写长评的一本多切片攻x可爱懵懂亲亲老婆受，我这个人看不了虐文，一丁点我都会直接弃文，所以不要怀疑，这真的是个很好看很值得书友们看一看的文，喜欢这个文的就入坑吧！我不能剧透太多不然就不好看了，你们慢慢探索就会觉得这是本好看的文，可能还没有到大神那个级别但是也不会差，希望我这个书评能帮到你们，也希望作者大大能继续写出更好的文！完结撒花！！！！！！期待我们的下次相遇！！！！！！[顶帖][顶帖][顶帖][顶帖][顶帖][顶帖][顶帖][爱心][爱心][爱心][爱心][爱心][爱心]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1693938701,"group_id":"7244184801844923429","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"擅长捕捉各种CP，架内都是甜文，可加入书架观看～","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwjhQCF0o19MPcf3ZrSht0yENM13CAgL4BPcxhFZgL57","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/81542c6af8844bfbace2b5698bc128a9~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776533167&x-signature=4Awfia9c836zkZ2W3ZkDTwOI6ho%3D","user_id":"1121929808579997","user_name":"爱河触手酱酱酿酿"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1121929808579997","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7244184801844923429","book_info":{"abstract":"【双男主＋切片无限流＋万人迷＋娇娇笨蛋美人】
